title: Kothrud ATM Cash Van Robbery
description: A cash replenishment van was intercepted in Kothrud at 6:30 AM by four armed suspects who had blocked the road with a truck. Guard overpowered, Rs 68 lakhs taken. Suspects fled in two separate vehicles. One suspect dropped a mobile phone at the scene.
modus_operandi: Four-person team, road block using decoy truck, early morning timing, split exit vehicles, guard overpowered.

suspects.description: Male, 5'8", drove decoy truck, face partially visible on overhead camera

evidence.description: Mobile phone dropped at scene — IMEI traced to purchaser
Overhead traffic camera captured decoy truck and suspect 2 face
Decoy truck found abandoned in Pune-Satara highway layby, wiped clean

blind_spots: Cash van route information leak not investigated until day 6
Mobile phone IMEI not traced for 2 days despite being day-0 evidence
Split vehicle exit routes not tracked on highway cameras until day 4
resolution: IMEI led to buyer who identified seller. Route information leak traced to van company insider. Four arrested by day 15.
